With r345929 - OK, r345932 and later - broken.

#define	ENOMEM		12		/* Cannot allocate memory */
Patch add return -ENOMEM on error:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/stable/12/sys/compat/linuxkpi/common/include/linux/sysfs.h?sortby=file&r1=345932&r2=345931&pathrev=345932
